observation.old_content:
#pragma once

#include <string>
#include <string_view>
#include <cstring>

namespace lex {

enum Id
{
  YYEMPTY = -2,
  YYEOF = 0,     /* "end of file"  */
  YYerror = 256, /* error  */
  YYUNDEF = 257, /* "invalid token"  */
  IDENTIFIER,
  CONSTANT,
  STRING_LITERAL,
  INT,
  RETURN,
  IF,
  ELSE,
  WHILE,
  BREAK,
  CONTINUE,
  VOID,
  CONST,
  L_BRACE,
  R_BRACE,
  L_SQUARE,
  R_SQUARE,
  L_PAREN,
  R_PAREN,
  SEMI,
  COMMA,
  EQUAL,
  EQUALEQUAL,
  PLUS,
  MINUS,
  STAR,
  SLASH,
  PERCENT,
  EXCLAIM,
  EXCLAIMEQUAL,
  AMPAMP,
  PIPEPIPE,
  LESS,
  GREATER,
  LESSEQUAL,
  GREATEREQUAL,
  AMP,
  PIPE,
  CARET,
  TILDE,
  LSHIFT,
  RSHIFT,
  PLUSEQUAL,
  MINUSEQUAL,
  STAREQUAL,
  SLASHEQUAL,
  PERCENTEQUAL,
  AMPEQUAL,
  PIPEEQUAL,
  CARETEQUAL,
  LSHIFTEQUAL,
  RSHIFTEQUAL,
  PLUSPLUS,
  MINUSMINUS,
  ARROW,
  QUESTION,
  COLON,
  DOT,
  ELLIPSIS,
};

const char*
id2str(Id id);

struct G
{
  Id mId{ YYEOF };
  std::string_view mText;
  std::string mFile;
  int mLine{ 1 };               // logical line number (from line markers)
  int mColumn{ 1 };             // current column position (start of next token)
  int mTokenColumn{ 1 };        // column of current token being emitted
  bool mStartOfLine{ true };
  bool mLeadingSpace{ false };
  bool mAfterLineMarker{ false };
};

extern G g;

int
come(int tokenId, const char* yytext, int yyleng);

void
handle_line_marker(const char* yytext, int yyleng);

} // namespace lex
observation.new_content:
#pragma once

#include <string>
#include <string_view>
#include <cstring>

namespace lex {

enum Id
{
  YYEMPTY = -2,
  YYEOF = 0,     /* "end of file"  */
  YYerror = 256, /* error  */
  YYUNDEF = 257, /* "invalid token"  */
  IDENTIFIER,
  CONSTANT,
  STRING_LITERAL,
  INT,
  RETURN,
  IF,
  ELSE,
  WHILE,
  BREAK,
  CONTINUE,
  VOID,
  CONST,
  L_BRACE,
  R_BRACE,
  L_SQUARE,
  R_SQUARE,
  L_PAREN,
  R_PAREN,
  SEMI,
  COMMA,
  EQUAL,
  EQUALEQUAL,
  PLUS,
  MINUS,
  STAR,
  SLASH,
  PERCENT,
  EXCLAIM,
  EXCLAIMEQUAL,
  AMPAMP,
  PIPEPIPE,
  LESS,
  GREATER,
  LESSEQUAL,
  GREATEREQUAL,
  AMP,
  PIPE,
  CARET,
  TILDE,
  LSHIFT,
  RSHIFT,
  PLUSEQUAL,
  MINUSEQUAL,
  STAREQUAL,
  SLASHEQUAL,
  PERCENTEQUAL,
  AMPEQUAL,
  PIPEEQUAL,
  CARETEQUAL,
  LSHIFTEQUAL,
  RSHIFTEQUAL,
  PLUSPLUS,
  MINUSMINUS,
  ARROW,
  QUESTION,
  COLON,
  DOT,
  ELLIPSIS,
};

const char*
id2str(Id id);

struct G
{
  Id mId{ YYEOF };
  std::string_view mText;
  std::string mFile;
  int mLine{ 1 };               // logical line number (from line markers)
  int mColumn{ 1 };             // current column position (start of next token)
  int mTokenColumn{ 1 };        // column of current token being emitted
  int mTokenLine{ 1 };          // line of current token being emitted
  bool mStartOfLine{ true };
  bool mLeadingSpace{ false };
  bool mAfterLineMarker{ false };
};

extern G g;

int
come(int tokenId, const char* yytext, int yyleng);

void
handle_line_marker(const char* yytext, int yyleng);

} // namespace lex
